Strengths

Structured and solution-oriented

Strong collaboration skills

Professional profile

Motivated and results-driven .NET developer with education in full-stack development and AI competencies, combined with broad professional experience in project coordination, administration, and sales. Used to aligning multiple stakeholders, driving initiatives forward, and delivering results in complex environments. Brings a strong combination of technical understanding, business mindset, communication skills, and continuous learning.

Projects (selected)

School Management System (.NET)

ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, SQL Server

  • Developed a web application for managing students, courses, teachers, and classes.
  • Implemented CRUD functionality and database integration using Entity Framework.
  • Designed backend structure and worked with relational databases and data modeling.

REST API - Person & Interests

C#, ASP.NET Core Web API

  • Built a REST API to manage people and their interests.
  • Designed and implemented endpoints and structured data models.
  • Worked with API design, separation of concerns, and scalable architecture.

ZEEYA - Project Platform (Team project)

HTML, CSS, JavaScript

  • Developed a web application for managing personal projects and tasks.
  • Contributed to frontend development and user-friendly interfaces.
  • Collaborated in a team environment using Git and version control.

Object Finder (AI / Azure)

C#, Azure Computer Vision

  • Developed an application that analyzes images and identifies objects using AI.
  • Integrated Azure Computer Vision API for image analysis.
  • Worked with external APIs and data processing workflows.

More projects available at: github.com/efremghebre

Work experience

Project Manager

Aug 2022 – Sep 2023

Robertsfors Municipality, Robertsfors, Sweden

  • Supported newly arrived individuals with labor market integration, social orientation, and career guidance.
  • Planned and coordinated study visits and matched participants with internship opportunities in collaboration with local employers.
  • Followed up on internship progress with employers to ensure participant development and quality outcomes.
  • Worked in a structured way with coordination, communication, and follow-up across multiple stakeholders.

Project Manager

Mar 2018 – Dec 2019

Robertsfors Municipality, Robertsfors, Sweden

  • Supported job seekers in their path to employment through guidance in CV writing, cover letters, and interview preparation.
  • Identified internship opportunities and organized study visits with employers.
  • Provided language support in professional settings and facilitated communication between employers and employees.
  • Worked with structured planning, coordination, and follow-up.

Assistant

Jun 2017 – Mar 2018

Swedish Public Employment Service, Robertsfors, Sweden

  • Provided administrative support and informed job seekers about rules, processes, and updates within the establishment program.
  • Delivered language support during meetings, registrations, and ongoing communication with participants.
  • Conducted follow-ups with employers and employees after internships or employment placements.
  • Contributed to structured workflows and efficient information management.

Project Manager, IPNC Division

Sep 2012 – Apr 2014

Almarai Company, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

  • Led the launch of a new project in collaboration with Mead Johnson (USA), overseeing execution and follow-up.
  • Coordinated and managed a team of pharmaceutical representatives and 66 sales supervisors across the region.
  • Monitored inventory, sales, and distribution to hospitals, pharmacies, and retail markets.
  • Conducted regular client visits to ensure customer satisfaction and product availability.

Sales Supervisor / Acting Sales Manager

Jan 2008 – Sep 2012

Almarai Company, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

  • Led and developed a sales team, including coaching, performance management, and daily follow-ups.
  • Ensured achievement of business targets through budget control and optimized distribution planning.
  • Maintained strong relationships with customers and market stakeholders to identify needs and improve performance.
  • Monitored daily and weekly performance metrics to support team success.

Key Account Manager / Sales Representative

May 2005 – Dec 2007

Almarai Company, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

  • Managed key accounts and maintained long-term business relationships.
  • Forecasted demand and optimized product distribution based on market conditions.
  • Ensured timely payments and customer satisfaction in line with company policies.
  • Maintained product availability and compliance with quality and cold chain standards.

Marketing & Team Leader

Mar 2000 – Dec 2004

Salim Mohammed Bakhashwen & Sons (SEB & Tefal Group), Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

  • Coordinated product distribution to company stores and external clients.
  • Ensured attractive and sales-driven product presentation in retail environments.
  • Led teams and contributed to efficient daily operations.
